caption: A presentation slide for a "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" course titled "Tutorial – 1" is displayed. The slide contains a mathematical equation for $y$ involving variables $h_l, h_g, h_f$, and $\varepsilon$, with a specified value of $\varepsilon_1 = 1$. Below the formula is a data table with columns labeled "1", "2", "f", and "g", and rows for pressure "p (bar)", temperature "T (K)", enthalpy "h (J/g)", and entropy "s (J/gK)". The bottom of the slide features an "NPTEL" logo and text identifying "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay". Across the frames, the content of the slide remains static, but a white cursor moves across the screen. The cursor starts at the top left, moves toward the center, and eventually descends to highlight the value "28.47" in the "h (J/g)" row under column "1".
